message: fix(ci): keep Node 20 for pnpm installs

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
-          node-version: '22'
+          node-version: '20'
       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
       - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - run: pnpm run lint
